roundup.title: Gemma 4 12B Drops: Edge Multimodal Open Model
roundup.subtitle: Gemma 4 12B 多模态开源模型发布，支持本地笔记本运行
headline: @googlegemma 正式发布 Gemma 4 12B，采用 encoder-free 统一多模态架构，支持文本、图像、音频和视频输入，256K 上下文，原生工具调用，Apache 2.0 许可下开源。
@demishassabis 宣布 Gemma 4 系列累计下载突破 1.5 亿，新 12B 模型可直接在笔记本上本地运行，填补边缘效率与高性能之间的空白。
@vllm_project 与 @RedHat_AI 同步提供 Day-0 支持，@ollama 和 @UnslothAI 也快速跟进本地部署方案，8GB RAM 即可运行动态 GGUF 版本。
@OpenAI 同期推出 GPT-Rosalind 生命科学专用模型系列，融合 GPT-5.5 的 agentic coding 与药物发现能力；@perplexity_ai 则发布 Windows 本地 Personal Computer Agent。

deepDives.title: Gemma 4 12B 统一多模态模型发布
deepDives.summary: Google 发布 12B 参数 encoder-free 多模态模型，支持文本/图像/音频/视频输入与 256K 上下文，Apache 2.0 开源许可，强调笔记本本地运行。

facts.text: Gemma 4 12B 为统一多模态模型，文本、图像、音频、视频直接投影至 LLM embedding 空间。
facts.quote: It's an encoder-free unified multimodal model — text, image, audio, and video all project straight into the LLM's embed

facts.text: 模型支持 256K 上下文、原生工具调用与内置 thinking，Apache 2.0 许可发布。
facts.quote: 256K context, built-in thinking, native tool calling

bullish.text: Gemma 4 12B 可在 8GB RAM 本地运行并支持训练
Day-0 vLLM 支持，多模态推理即刻可用

bullets.text: @perplexity_ai 发布 Windows 本地 Personal Computer Agent，支持跨应用与文件编排。
@cursor_ai 上线 Auto-review 模式，减少 agent 工具调用审批提示。
@PrimeIntellect 发布 33B MoE Laguna XS.2，SWE-bench 得分 68.2%。
@togethercompute 优化 MiniMax-M3 推理，agentic 流量吞吐提升 81–125%。
@github Copilot SDK 正式 GA，支持将 agentic engine 嵌入自有应用。
@turbopuffer 推出 namespace 分支功能，P50 延迟 440ms。

topTweets.author: @googlegemma
topTweets.text: 发布 Gemma 4 12B 统一多模态模型，Apache 2.0 开源，支持笔记本本地运行。
topTweets.whyItMatters: 边缘多模态开源模型新标杆

topTweets.author: @demishassabis
topTweets.text: Gemma 4 系列下载破 1.5 亿，新 12B 模型强调本地部署。
topTweets.whyItMatters: 开源模型规模化采用信号

topTweets.author: @PrimeIntellect
topTweets.text: 33B MoE Laguna XS.2 达 SWE-bench 68.2%，支持免费环境训练。

topTweets.author: @cursor_ai
topTweets.text: Auto-review 模式降低 agent 工具调用审批负担。
topTweets.whyItMatters: 生产级 agent 体验优化

takeaways: Gemma 4 12B 提供 256K 上下文与多模态本地推理，AI Engineer 可快速在消费级硬件验证 agentic workflow。
vLLM、Ollama、Unsloth Day-0 支持显示开源 infra 响应速度已成标配。
SWE-bench 68.2% 的 33B MoE 模型出现，编码 agent 性价比竞争加剧。
Perplexity 与 Cursor 等产品持续打磨持久执行与 harness 架构，值得关注生产落地细节。

items.author: @SemiAnalysis_
items.text: Vertical power delivery, flexible moving-pin interposers, and direct-impingement water cooling. Cerebras had to rewrite the mechanical engineering playbook just to keep a single wafer from cracking itself apart.
items.whyItMatters: Cerebras 晶圆级冷却与互连创新

items.author: @fal
items.text: Some jaw-dropping demos at our 3D GenMedia Meetup last night. Builders from across the 3D and generative media ecosystem shared a glimpse into where AI-generated materials, virtual worlds, animation, and creative tooling are headed. Huge thanks to everyone who demoed their work, and to @KindredVentures for hosting us.
items.whyItMatters: 3D 生成媒体最新 demo，AI 工程师关注生成式 3D 工具进展。

items.author: @RedHat_AI
items.text: Gemma 4 12B dropped today. Apache 2.0, multimodal: text, image, audio, and video. 256K context, built-in thinking, native tool calling. Running on Red Hat OpenShift AI with @vllm_project on Day 0:
items.whyItMatters: Gemma 4开源多模态模型发布，支持vLLM部署

items.author: @OpenAI
items.text: We’re bringing new capabilities to GPT-Rosalind, a model series purpose-built for life sciences research at enterprise scale. It brings GPT-5.5’s agentic coding and tool use together with stronger intelligence for drug discovery, analysis, design, and experimental workflows.
items.whyItMatters: 生命科学专用模型，agentic coding + 药物发现

items.author: @vllm_project
items.text: Congrats to the @googlegemma team on the Gemma 4 12B launch 🎉 Day-0 support on vLLM is ready to go. It's an encoder-free unified multimodal model — text, image, audio, and video all project straight into the LLM's embedding space.
items.whyItMatters: Gemma 4 12B vLLM Day-0 支持，多模态推理

items.author: @AnthropicAI
items.text: How well do the security community's techniques hold up against AI-enabled cyberattacks? We examined 832 malicious accounts and mapped their activity onto a longstanding database of tactics and techniques used by threat actors.
items.whyItMatters: AI 网络威胁 MITRE ATT&CK 实证研究

items.author: @ollama
items.text: .@GoogleDeepMind's Gemma 4 - 12B is available on Ollama! Chat: ollama run gemma4:12b-mlx Hermes Agent: ollama launch hermes --model gemma4:12b-mlx Claude Code: ollama launch claude --model gemma4:12b-mlx and more 👇👇👇
items.whyItMatters: Gemma 4 12B本地部署，支持Agent/Coding工具，实用开源更新

items.author: @UnslothAI
items.text: Gemma 4 12B can now run locally on just 8GB RAM via Dynamic GGUFs. Google's new model, Gemma 4 12B Unified supports image, audio and 256K context. You can run and train the model via Unsloth Studio.
items.whyItMatters: 低配硬件运行多模态模型，优化本地推理与训练

items.author: @perplexity_ai
items.text: Personal Computer is coming to Windows. Personal Computer for Windows runs on your machine and orchestrates across the apps and files you use every day. We'll roll out first to paying Max and Enterprise Max subscribers on the waitlist.
items.whyItMatters: 本地Agentic Computer产品发布，扩展企业/个人AI工作流

items.author: @claudeai
items.text: We spoke with @BenJames_____ about building things, creativity, and why silly ideas matter.
items.whyItMatters: Claude Code实际创意构建案例，展示AI辅助硬件/原型开发

items.author: @googlegemma
items.text: Meet Gemma 4 12B! A unified, encoder-free multimodal model designed to bring high-performance intelligence directly to your laptop, and released under an Apache 2.0 license. Bridging the gap between edge efficiency and advanced reasoning.
items.whyItMatters: 12B 多模态开源模型，支持本地笔记本运行，Apache 2.0 许可

items.author: @demishassabis
items.text: Celebrating the milestone of a massive 150+ million downloads of Gemma 4 with the release of the new Gemma 4 12B model! It's incredibly powerful for such a small model and it’s tiny enough to run locally on a laptop with just 16GB VRAM. Apache 2.0 license - happy building!
items.whyItMatters: Gemma 4 系列下载破 1.5 亿，新 12B 模型发布，边缘部署亮点

items.author: @NVIDIAAI
items.text:
OpenShell v0.0.55

🧩 Google Vertex AI inference provider  
🔒 Profile-backed policy visibility  
🐳 Better Podman detection in the gateway  
🖥️ Restored GPU procfs baseline behavior  
🔧 CI and docs fixes

Run agents against Vertex AI, with improved policy visibility and more reliable Podman and GPU sandbox behavior.
items.whyItMatters: Vertex AI Agent 集成与 GPU 沙箱优化

items.author: @GeminiApp
items.text:
Gemini Spark is available in Beta for Google AI Ultra subscribers, starting in the U.S.

Join @GoogleDeepMind Principal Engineer @__apf__ to walk through how Gemini Spark helps simplify your daily workflows.
items.whyItMatters: Gemini Spark Beta 上线，Workspace 集成

items.author: @OpenRouter
items.text:
The Pareto Router is now processing almost 1B tokens per day: https://openrouter.ai/openrouter/pareto-code

The Auto Router is processing 12B: https://openrouter.ai/openrouter/auto
items.whyItMatters: Pareto Code Router 日处理近 1B tokens

items.author: @cloneofsimo
items.text: Oh wow! Insane open model
items.whyItMatters: Ideogram 4.0 发布全球最佳开源图像模型

items.author: @GergelyOrosz
items.text: It's starting. The company with the cheapest coding model at a good enough quality is set to win big, as devs + companies become more price sensitive. Of all the major players, Cursor is in a v good position with their Composer model. Plus eg Factory with smart routing
items.whyItMatters: AI 编码工具价格战开启，Cursor/Factory 路由策略值得关注。

items.author: @GergelyOrosz
items.text: Rare to hear a founder of an AI coding harness be this honest. A reason I respect @thdxr "We’re shipping way more hacks where we should have just rethought the whole system from the ground up, or redesigned it to make it more flexible. So I think our judgement is just off.”
items.whyItMatters: AI 代理编码易引入技术债，工程师需警惕判断力退化问题。

items.author: @PrimeIntellect
items.text: Laguna XS.2 is a 33B MoE open weight model built for agentic coding. 68.2% on SWE-bench. Now you can train it with your own environments for free.
items.whyItMatters: 33B MoE agentic coding模型SWE-bench 68.2%，免费训练

items.author: @kellerjordan0
items.text: Modded-NanoGPT optimization result #29 (2026/05/14): @eliebakouch has achieved a new step-count record of 2930 via the following techniques: Add Aurora to mlp.proj, Warmup & cooldown Muon mu...
items.whyItMatters: NanoGPT新优化纪录，Muon等技术突破

items.author: @googleaidevs
items.text: We’re launching Gemma 4 12B: Our unified, encoder-free model that brings powerful multimodal intelligence straight to your laptop 🚀 ... Agentic Performance (16GB VRAM): Run complex, multi-step workflows locally...
items.whyItMatters: Gemma 4 12B开源发布，支持本地多模态agentic workflow

items.author: @AssemblyAI
items.text: @dan_aai is running a live workshop on building a voice agent with Claude Code on June 10 at 10am PT. You'll walk away with: Starter code... A working agent... A mental model...

items.author: @dzhng
items.text: Chat UX is broken once you start running a ton of agents that listens to events and loops forever. We've been piloting a new kanban interface in @duetchat - the columns are generated for each workflow and managed by a parent orchestrator. This is THE best interface to tokenmaxx
items.whyItMatters: 多agent工作流新kanban界面，优化token使用与orchestration

items.author: @lmstudio
items.text:
Gemma 4 model load issues fixed in engine version 2.20.1.

lms runtime update --all

items.author: @matei_zaharia
items.text: This is going to be awesome, human plus AI teams competing in real time at @Data_AI_Summit to answer challenging questions. I think this is the first competition of this kind for LLM researchers.

items.author: @OpenAINewsroom
items.text: There’s real momentum right now for AI safety policy. Yesterday’s EO on cyber was an important step forward. We’re proposing a set of ideas for policymakers to consider next and to put the US out in front on frontier safety.

items.author: @poolsideai
items.text: Laguna M.1 is #1 on @kilocode today. Good to see Laguna getting put to work.
items.whyItMatters: Poolside Laguna 模型登顶 coding leaderboard

items.author: @robotsdigest
items.text: A useful way to view PointAction is as a factorization of robot intelligence into two stages. First, learn a large-scale generative model that predicts how the 3D world evolves. Second, learn a small robot-specific decoder...
items.whyItMatters: 机器人 3D 动作预测新论文，具身智能研究进展

items.author: @shannholmberg
items.text: the difference between open and closed research agents applies to any type of marketing verticals
items.whyItMatters: 详解开源vs封闭研究Agent设计，适用于各类垂直领域

items.author: @cursor_ai
items.text: A great cloud agent experience involves a lot more than moving a local agent to a server. We've learned that it requires a durable execution platform, a powerful harness, and the tools and infra to give agents realistic development environments.
items.whyItMatters: Cursor 云 Agent 架构经验分享

items.author: @vllm_project
items.text: 🎉 MiniCPM-o 4.5 has been merged into vLLM-Omni 🎙️ It's a 9B end-to-end omnimodal model: text / image / audio / video in, text + speech out.
items.whyItMatters: MiniCPM-o 4.5 vLLM-Omni 集成，多模态 serving

items.author: @GoogleDeepMind
items.text: We believe AI can be a dedicated research partner to help discover the next breakthrough. Enter Co-Scientist: our latest Gemini-based multi-agent system that can generate, debate and evolve novel hypotheses for complex scientific problems 🧵
items.whyItMatters: 多Agent系统加速科学发现，AI Engineer关注前沿Agent应用

items.author: @togethercompute
items.text: MiniMax-M3 combines 1M context, native multimodality, and MiniMax Sparse Attention. Together’s Inference and Kernel teams improved throughput by 81–125% across common agentic-shape traffic.
items.whyItMatters: 1M 上下文多模态模型推理优化，吞吐提升超 80%

items.author: @github
items.text:
The GitHub Copilot SDK is now generally available.

Embed Copilot's agentic engine into your own applications, services, and developer tools with a stable API and production-ready support. 🤖
items.whyItMatters: Copilot SDK GA，支持 Agent 嵌入

items.author: @danielhanchen
items.text: Excited to partner with Microsoft to bring Aion 1.0 Plan to Windows devices locally! Aion 1.0 Plan represents an evolution of what the Windows on-device AI platform is capable of at scale!
items.whyItMatters: UnslothAI 与微软合作推进本地 on-device AI

items.author: @_lewtun
items.text: We just added speculative decoding for Carbon, so you can now generate DNA sequences 2-3x faster with llama.cpp. This enables anyone to process huge genomes locally! GGUF weights and quants: https://huggingface.co/collections/HuggingFaceBio/carbon
items.whyItMatters: llama.cpp 推测解码加速 DNA 序列生成，支持本地运行

items.author: @julien_c
items.text: We have doubled the amount of total storage on @huggingface in the past five months. At this rate, we will cross 1 Exabyte before the end of the year 🔥
items.whyItMatters: HF存储翻倍，预示开源AI数据规模爆发

items.author: @LangChain_OSS
items.text: RubricMiddleware helps your agent verify task completion with a grader subagent. This is similar to /goal in claude code or codex, but for deepagents!
items.whyItMatters: LangGraph新增RubricMiddleware，提升Agent可靠性

items.author: @runwayml
items.text: Aleph 2.0 is now available via the Runway API. Bring precise video editing directly into your apps, products and platforms. Edit up to 30 seconds of video at 1080p across multi-shot sequences...
items.whyItMatters: Runway Aleph 2.0 API发布，精准视频编辑

items.author: @turbopuffer
items.text:
new: branching

create an instant, copy-on-write clone of a tpuf namespace

→ constant-time (440ms p50, ~1s p99)
→ fully independent
→ unlimited branches, unlimited branch depth

docs: https://turbopuffer.com/docs/branching
items.whyItMatters: 向量数据库分支功能，AI 应用数据实验与部署提速

items.author: @wandb
items.text:
You can't teleoperate your way to every edge case a robot will face.

There are too many, and the rare ones are the ones that break things.

So generate them instead. What you're watching is teleoperation-equivalent demos, produced in minutes via @nvidia Cosmos 3.
items.whyItMatters: NVIDIA Cosmos 3 合成机器人数据飞轮，加速 agent 训练

items.author: @wandb
items.text:
It works with whatever you built. OpenClaw, Hermes, LangChain, the Claude or OpenAI Agents SDK, Google ADK, your own.

If it emits OTel, @wb_weave reads it without any custom instrumentation.
items.whyItMatters: Weave 支持 OpenTelemetry，生产级 agent 可观测性零代码接入

items.author: @jeffboudier
items.text:
Just now from @satyanadella at Microsoft Build keynote : over 11,000 models are available in Microsoft Foundry

Super proud to contribute to it - @huggingface provides 10,928 of those!
items.whyItMatters: HF模型大规模落地Microsoft Foundry，AI工程师关注部署生态

items.author: @OpenAINewsroom
items.text: Codex now has more than 5M weekly active users. But the bigger story is what people are using it for: not just writing code, but getting more work done across research, analysis, content, and operations.
items.whyItMatters: Codex 用户量与生产力报告，AI coding 工具采用趋势

items.author: @AnthropicAI
items.text: Anthropic has confidentially submitted a draft S-1 registration statement to the Securities and Exchange Commission. Pending completion of SEC review, this gives us the option to pursue an initial public offering.
items.whyItMatters: AI 巨头 IPO 准备，估值与融资信号强

items.author: @GoogleAIStudio
items.text: getting started with managed agents in the gemini api: an inside look with @OfficialLoganK, @_philschmid, and @alihcevik
items.whyItMatters: Gemini API 托管 Agent 实战教程

items.author: @allen_ai
items.text:
We're extending AutoDiscovery early access through July 31. 

New accounts start with 500 Hypothesis Credits (one credit = one hypothesis), & any credits you already have will still work.
items.whyItMatters: AutoDiscovery 早鸟延至 7 月底

items.author: @AndrewYNg
items.text: One of the new, buzzy jobs in Silicon Valley is the AI Forward Deployed Engineer (FDE)... I see surging demand for AI Engineers who can build software applications using AI software components... Skilled AI Engineers are in very high demand!
items.whyItMatters: Andrew Ng 分析 AI Engineer vs FDE 职业路径与需求

items.author: @denisyarats
items.text: Introducing Search as Code, our new search architecture for AI agents. It writes Python that calls our search stack directly... Available in the Perplexity Agent API, and now default in Computer.
items.whyItMatters: Perplexity 推出 Search as Code，优化 AI Agent 搜索效率

items.author: @GoogleAI
items.text: Read more about all the fun ways we used AI to bring I/O to life this year: https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/technology/ai/io-2026-google-ai/
items.whyItMatters: Google I/O 2026 AI 应用案例汇总，了解最新产品集成实践。

items.author: @turbopuffer
items.text:
tpuf quantizes vectors to improve perf (RaBitQ)

the algo randomly rotates vectors, and we were using matmul at O(d²) space & time, brutal at high dims. 10k = 400MB in RAM!

we rebuilt the rotation using FWHT at O(d) space & O(d log d) time. ~no recall loss, 10k = only 5kB in RAM
items.whyItMatters: 高维向量量化优化，推理内存与速度大幅提升

items.author: @jeffboudier
items.text: NVIDIA announced RTX Spark today at Computex. ... Local AI go mainstream, with personal agents running privately, on your own hardware
items.whyItMatters: NVIDIA RTX Spark推动本地AI与个人Agent，硬件落地信号

items.author: @ScaleAILabs
items.text: Today we're releasing HiL-Dynamics, the first open-source tool that measures how production agents actually collaborate with humans under uncertainty. Not just whether they got the answer. Now you can measure exactly when your agent asks for help, when it makes assumptions, and when it'll confidently ship the wrong ans
items.whyItMatters: 开源工具量化Agent人机协作表现，指导可靠Agent构建

items.author: @TencentHunyuan
items.text: 🚀We’re excited to officially release Hy-Memory — a powerful memory plugin built specifically for long-term collaborative Agents like OpenClaw. More than a retrieval tool, it becomes your Agent’s true “Second Brain.” Powered by a 6-layer memory framework × System1/System2 dual system × three-layer evolutionary chain...
items.whyItMatters: 发布Hy-Memory插件，大幅提升长程Agent记忆与协作效率

items.author: @ScaleAILabs
items.text: We evaluated five production agent stacks: Codex, Claude Code, Google Antigravity, ADK, and OpenCode... Even with the best enhancements, agents still struggle to escalate to humans at the right moment. State-of-the-art agents remain far from reliable human collaboration.
items.whyItMatters: 基准测试5大Agent栈，揭示人机协作仍是核心瓶颈

items.author: @SakanaAILabs
items.text: DiffusionBlocks: Training Neural Networks One Block at a Time. We introduce DiffusionBlocks, a principled framework that partitions a residual network into blocks and trains each one independently by reinterpreting block-wise updates as the reverse process of a diffusion model.
items.whyItMatters: 新框架逐块训练残差网络，扩散模型视角创新

items.author: @cursor_ai
items.text: Auto-review mode is now available in Cursor. It allows agents to run tool calls with fewer approval prompts and safer execution.
items.whyItMatters: Cursor Agent 自动审核模式，减少人工干预

items.author: @cohere
items.text:
Command A+ makes major gains in high-impact non-Latin languages; outperforming Mistral Medium 3.5 in Korean, Japanese, Hebrew, Chinese, and Arabic.

For Arabic, that gap becomes: +5 pts over Mistral Medium 3.5 +10 pts over DeepSeek V4 Pro
items.whyItMatters: Command A+ 多语言显著提升

items.author: @bcherny
items.text: Salesforce published a detailed writeup on going agentic with Claude Code. A couple things jumped out. A migration they'd scoped at 231 days shipped in 13. One PR delivered 21 endpoints at 100% test coverage.
items.whyItMatters: Claude Code 驱动 agentic 工作流，生产力大幅提升案例

items.author: @GoogleAI
items.text: Hear the architects of Gemini reflect on their journey to continue pushing the frontier of AI, on this episode of Release Notes. @JeffDean, @koraykv, @OriolVinyalsML, and @NoamShazeer sit down on camera together to share a behind-the-scenes look at the people behind the model, and how they saw the vision come together.
items.whyItMatters: Gemini 核心团队分享模型演进内幕，AI工程师可洞察前沿模型开发思路。
